source.scope: Official-source-backed France 2026 assessment of 2025 income under the standard Article 197 household quotient calculation.

FR.notes: Article 197 household quotient tariff with the general EUR 1,807 half-part cap, overseas-department reduction and decote. Special quotient caps, quarter-parts, credits, contributions and non-resident minima remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 assessment of 2025 income using the standard Article 197 household quotient calculation.
